notes: Chunk 35+Blog Day 9 complete 2026-06-06. Chunk 35: Template E (Data-Forward), 15 routes - final Tier A batch. Corridors: india-to-malaysia, india-to-philippines, india-to-thailand, japan-to-india, japan-to-malaysia, japan-to-thailand, malaysia-to-india, malaysia-to-philippines, malaysia-to-thailand, philippines-to-india, south-korea-to-india, south-korea-to-malaysia, south-korea-to-philippines, south-korea-to-thailand, thailand-to-india. Key regulatory data: India no titre test (AQCS NOC pre-departure, 15-day quarantine); Malaysia FAVN titre + 3-month wait for non-scheduled countries, 14-day quarantine (Dec 2024); Philippines SPSIC from BAI (not titre test), 30-day quarantine; Thailand DLD permit by email, no titre test, no mandatory quarantine; Japan rabies-free (MAFF cert). Blog Day 9: pet-transport-uk-to-jersey.md (1600 words, Marcus Webb). UK to Jersey: no AHC, no pet passport, no quarantine; Condor Ferries from Poole/Portsmouth, or cargo flight. Also covers Guernsey and Isle of Man. Tier A: 15 -> 0 (Tier A complete). Next chunk 36 (Template A, Field Manual, Tier B). Blog Day 10 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
